$source: Auto-managed by scripts/update-health-alerts.mjs (runs fortnightly via .github/workflows/update-health-alerts.yml). DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — manual edits will be overwritten.

alerts.title: Level 1 - Global Dengue
alerts.summary: Dengue is a year-round risk in many parts of the world, with outbreaks commonly occurring every 2–5 years. Travelers to risk areas should prevent mosquito bites. Country List : Colombia, Samoa, Cook Islands (New Zealand), Bangladesh, Mali, Vietnam, New Caledonia (France), Timor-Leste (East Timor), Guyana, Maldives, Bol

alerts.title: Level 2 - Meningococcal Disease in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
alerts.summary: There is an outbreak of meningococcal disease in the Mangembo Health Zone of Kongo Central Province. The best way to protect yourself is to get meningococcal vaccination.

alerts.title: Level 2 - Yellow Fever in Venezuela
alerts.summary: An increased number of cases of yellow fever have been reported throughout Venezuela.

alerts.title: Level 2 - Chikungunya in Mayotte
alerts.summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Mayotte. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

alerts.title: Level 2 - Global Polio
alerts.summary: Some international destinations have circulating poliovirus. Before any international travel, make sure you are up to date on your polio vaccines. Country List : Afghanistan, Algeria, Benin, Cameroon, Chad, Côte d'Ivoire (Ivory Coast), Democratic Republic of the Congo, Niger, Nigeria, Pakistan, Somalia, Yemen, Sudan, G
